name: Insetstep
description: Concentric squares stepping inward, every ring re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 20%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 40%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
